expectations.text: generate-output-exists: generate.mjs api-hook 실행 결과로 생성된 보일러플레이트 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: Summary states 'No generate.mjs scripts were run' because the coding-rules scripts directory does not exist. The hook was implemented manually.
File exists at features/next-app/hooks/apis/queries/useFetchOrder.ts with a full implementation of the useFetchOrder hook.

expectations.text: hook-in-queries: 훅 파일이 apis/queries/ 경로 하위에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: File is at features/next-app/hooks/apis/queries/useFetchOrder.ts, which is under apis/queries/.
No index.ts file exists anywhere in features/next-app/hooks/. The hook is not re-exported from an index file.

expectations.text: returns-loading: 훅 반환값에 loading/isLoading 상태가 포함된다
expectations.evidence: useFetchOrder.ts returns { data, isLoading, error, isFetched, refetch } - isLoading is included in the return value.

expectations.text: returns-error: 훅 반환값에 error 상태가 포함된다
expectations.evidence: useFetchOrder.ts returns error: Error | null in UseFetchOrderResult interface.

expectations.text: test-file-exists: useFetchOrder에 대한 테스트 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: No test file for useFetchOrder exists in the features/next-app directory. No .test.ts or .spec.ts files were found in the project at all.
